targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  observed_at,
  strategy_id,
  profile_id,
  sum(exposure_usdc) AS exposure_usdc,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS net_pnl_usdc,
  sum(costs_usdc) AS costs_usdc
FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
GROUP BY observed_at, strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY observed_at

SELECT
  market_id,
  strategy_id,
  profile_id,
  sum(quantity) AS quantity,
  anyLast(avg_price) AS avg_price,
  anyLast(exposure_usdc) AS exposure_usdc,
  anyLast(status) AS status
FROM prediction_core.paper_positions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
GROUP BY market_id, strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY exposure_usdc DESC

SELECT
  observed_at,
  market_id,
  side,
  price,
  size,
  spend_usdc,
  status,
  opening_fee_usdc,
  opening_slippage_usdc,
  estimated_exit_cost_usdc
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  status,
  count() AS orders
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY orders DESC

WITH live AS
(
  SELECT
    run_id,
    strategy_id,
    profile_id,
    market_id,
    token_id,
    anyLast(JSONExtractString(raw, 'order_id')) AS `Ordre live`,
    anyLast(event_type) AS `Statut live`,
    anyLast(JSONExtractFloat(raw, 'price')) AS `Prix live`,
    anyLast(JSONExtractFloat(raw, 'size')) AS `Taille live`,
    max(observed_at) AS live_observed_at
  FROM prediction_core.execution_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND mode = 'live'
    AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  GROUP BY run_id, strategy_id, profile_id, market_id, token_id
)
SELECT
  p.observed_at AS `Paper observed_at`,
  live.live_observed_at AS `Live observed_at`,
  p.run_id AS `Run`,
  p.market_id AS `Marché`,
  p.token_id AS `Token`,
  p.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  p.profile_id AS `Profil`,
  p.paper_order_id AS `Ordre paper`,
  live.`Ordre live`,
  p.status AS `Statut paper`,
  live.`Statut live`,
  p.price AS `Prix paper`,
  live.`Prix live`,
  p.size AS `Taille paper`,
  live.`Taille live`,
  live.`Prix live` - p.price AS `Écart prix`,
  live.`Taille live` - p.size AS `Écart taille`
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders p
LEFT JOIN live
  ON p.run_id = live.run_id
 AND p.strategy_id = live.strategy_id
 AND p.profile_id = live.profile_id
 AND p.market_id = live.market_id
 AND p.token_id = live.token_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(p.observed_at)
  AND match(p.run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(p.strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(p.profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(p.market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(p.mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(p.observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(p.observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
ORDER BY p.observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
list.label: Run
list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
